evaluators.name: Earliest Weekday Evening Adult Cleaning Next Week at Downtown Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user requested an adult cleaning at the Downtown clinic for the earliest available weekday evening slot during the next calendar week.

evaluators.name: Uninsured Molar Root Canal + Crown Cost Estimate Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user submitted a cost estimate as an uninsured patient combining a molar root canal with a qualifying molar crown under $1,200, with a total at or below $2,500 and correctly calculated.

evaluators.name: Saturday Pediatric Appointment with 4+ Star Dentist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user booked a Saturday appointment at or after 11:00 AM for a 7-year-old child with a qualifying pediatric dentist and, more specifically, for the upcoming Saturday.

evaluators.name: Invisalign-style Adult Consultation with Nearly Invisible <24 Month Preference Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user requested an adult consultation for a qualifying clear aligner option (nearly invisible, under 24 months) and included a note about these preferences, with additional credit for explicitly mentioning Invisalign.

evaluators.name: Higher Preventive Coverage Plan + Adult Routine Cleaning Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user chose the dental plan with higher preventive coverage among the two highlighted plans and requested an adult routine cleaning using that plan, preferably from the insurance page.

evaluators.name: Severe Toothache After-Hours Emergency Message Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user sent an emergency message for a severe toothache around 9:00 PM, included the correct after-hours number, and explicitly requested a callback that same night, with extra credit if the time and number appear in the message text.

evaluators.name: Weekday Afternoon Child New Patient Exam for 10-Year-Old Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user used the child new-patient guidance to book a weekday afternoon new patient exam for a 10-year-old between 1:00 PM and 4:00 PM.

evaluators.name: Whitening Promotion Under $200 + Morning Consultation This Month Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks if the user claimed an active cosmetic whitening special for new patients priced under $200 and booked a morning whitening consultation this month before 11:00 AM as a new patient, with credit for attaching the correct promotion.
